title: About me
hero-title: A generalist who builds for the web.
hero-summary: I work mostly on frontend systems, product interfaces, and tools that make daily work easier.
methodology-body: I like understanding how things fit together, whether I am working on code, photos, or language learning.
methodology-coda: The goal is simple: make things that are clear, useful, and maintainable.
bio-integrity: A good interface should explain itself. People should not have to fight the screen to understand what is happening.
bio-subtractive: I usually start by removing noise, then keep what helps the user move forward.
timeline-empty-description: Experience entries will show up again when the content connection is back.
